global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'EarnPath' logo positioned in the top left. The main message is conveyed through a prominent headline 'Secure & simple' centered in the upper middle, followed by body text 'Built for peace of mind' directly below. A call to action 'Order now' is located at the bottom center. Decorative elements enhance the visual appeal without overwhelming the main content.
global.visual_style: Modern design with a clean layout and vibrant accents

elements.label: EarnPath text logo
elements.description: The logo of the EarnPath app, displayed prominently at the top of the crop.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Supporting descriptive text below the headline.

elements.label: Call to Action
elements.description: A button with action text located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Segmented crop
elements.description: A segmented crop showing abstract shapes and a rectangular area, likely part of the ad's design.

elements.label: Shapes
elements.description: Abstract shapes including an oval and a rectangle, positioned in the upper part of the crop.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A circular shape located in the crop, likely decorative.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for EarnPath Invest emphasizing security and simplicity in investing.
